白棠肤白貌美，身娇体软，无数人心中的白月光。
一场意外 她莫名绑定了一个系统
让她穿成了各种炮灰，替她们达成心愿。
从此，白棠走上收拾罪魁祸首，复仇逆袭之路。
后来，他们无数人跪在白棠面前。
“棠棠，我错了，原谅我吧。”
白棠红唇轻启，冷笑，“原谅，绝对不可能。”
再后来，系统崩溃了，“大小姐，轻点虐，位面男主又自杀了。”
“哦，那便开启下一个世界。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d1821596f4f90d364d853d612270f270","author":"夜流光","author_id":"","book_id":"7118556357275421731","book_name":"当大佬夺回气运后，主角变渣渣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4796人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7118557368861852192","read_count":"4796","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1235087"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"604","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,幻想言情,穿越,女强,无CP,虐渣,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f15e4dcd34da00572b9336e7be5aeeb7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290140&x-signature=DCHOgWqtULK%2BaPb%2BYe9uscB%2By1Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_li 白棠肤白貌美，身娇体软，无数人心中的白月光。
一场意外 她莫名绑定了一个系统
让她穿成了各种炮灰，替她们达成心愿。
从此，白棠走上收拾罪魁祸首，复仇逆袭之路。
后来，他们无数人跪在白棠面前。
“棠棠，我错了，原谅我吧。”
白棠红唇轻启，冷笑，“原谅，绝对不可能。”
再后来，系统崩溃了，“大小姐，轻点虐，位面男主又自杀了。”

白棠肤白貌美，身娇体软，无数人心中的白月光。
一场意外 她莫名绑定了一个系统
让她穿成了各种炮灰，替她们达成心愿。
从此，白棠走上收拾罪魁祸首，复仇逆袭之路。
后来，他们无数人跪在白棠面前。
“棠棠，我错了，原谅我吧。”
白棠红唇轻启，冷笑，“原谅，绝对不可能。”
再后来，系统崩溃了，“大小姐，轻点虐，位面男主又自杀了。”
“哦，那便开启下一个世界。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d1821596f4f90d364d853d612270f270","author":"夜流光","author_id":"","book_id":"7118556357275421731","book_name":"当大佬夺回气运后，主角变渣渣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4796人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7118557368861852192","read_count":"4796","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1235087"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"604","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,幻想言情,穿越,女强,无CP,虐渣,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f15e4dcd34da00572b9336e7be5aeeb7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290140&x-signature=DCHOgWqtULK%2BaPb%2BYe9uscB%2By1Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_li st":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2973498702574319","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"512"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":66693,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":581},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7264490429914825527","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"算是快穿里中等偏上的水平，最喜欢“锦鲤文中的反派”这个篇章，最讨厌“被偏爱的姐姐”这个篇章，女主的成长也肉眼可见，说实话我不太喜欢太强势太牛逼的女主，可能是看多了感觉没什么爽感了，反而这种成长型的女主目前是比较喜欢的，作者要备考停更了，祝愿作者逢考必过，一路顺风。如果有继续更新，希望作者能写一篇“无声正义”，抖音刷到过一个为聋哑人做辩护的律师，他的故事挺感人的，可惜看了好多快穿文没有人写，自己文笔不足也不敢写。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691396077,"group_id":"7118556357275421731","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咸鱼一条。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1vwYJM+gbIYMLhI2gGNo4vhec5pFggOw5n0y7dA/ppo","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fc1cdb673f5b4670857c2e8a4763c649~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620696&x-signature=cTCb02gInMGU5lwfEcsQiYeXEqQ%3D","user_id":"4498805776449900","user_name":"Tears_."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4498805776449900","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1718811012,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":13,"name":"2023年度报告","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dd9f8eacb755a347a6d08bf87725f182","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dd9f8eacb755a347a6d08bf87725f182"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7118556357275421731","book_info":{"abstract":"（无cp+女强+爽文+逆袭）
白棠肤白貌美，身娇体软，无数人心中的白月光。
一场意外 她莫名绑定了一个系统
让她穿成了各种炮灰，替她们达成心愿。
从此，白棠走上收拾罪魁祸首，复仇逆袭之路。
后来，他们无数人跪在白棠面前。
“棠棠，我错了，原谅我吧。”
白棠红唇轻启，冷笑，“原谅，绝对不可能。”
再后来，系统崩溃了，“大小姐，轻点虐，位面男主又自杀了。”
“哦，那便开启下一个世界。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d1821596f4f90d364d853d612270f270","author":"夜流光","author_id":"","book_id":"7118556357275421731","book_name":"当大佬夺回气运后，主角变渣渣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4796人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7118557368861852192","read_count":"4796","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1235087"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"604","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,幻想言情,穿越,女强,无CP,虐渣,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f15e4dcd34da00572b9336e7be5aeeb7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779290140&x-signature=DCHOgWqtULK%2BaPb%2BYe9uscB%2By1Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_li
